answers: Dealing with homesickness: stay busy, create new routines, video call home, explore your new area, and make local friends.
Tips: bring comfort items from home, cook familiar food, join clubs/groups, and remember why you moved.
Homesickness is normal — it shows you love your home. It fades as you build a life in your new place.
Bari miss kora: video call koro, notun friends banao, baire ghuro, ar busy thako. Time er sathe thik hoye jabe.
